root.sql:
select sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name , sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_name , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_surname , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.date_of_birth
,PKA_LON_REQSRV.fp_calc_agetext( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.date_of_birth, localtimestamp) as age
, coalesce((select share_amount from sc_mem_m_share_mem where sc_mem_m_share_mem.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) ,0)as share_amount
, coalesce((select share_stock from sc_mem_m_share_mem where sc_mem_m_share_mem.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) ,0)as share_stock
, coalesce((select sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_balance from sc_dep_m_creditor where sc_dep_m_creditor.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_dep_m_creditor.close_status = '0' and sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_type_code = '10' ) ,0)as deposit_type_10
, coalesce((select sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_balance from sc_dep_m_creditor where sc_dep_m_creditor.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_dep_m_creditor.close_status = '0' and sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_type_code = '20' ) ,0)as deposit_type_20
, coalesce((select sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_balance from sc_dep_m_creditor where sc_dep_m_creditor.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_dep_m_creditor.close_status = '0' and sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_type_code = '30' ) ,0)as deposit_type_30
from sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_mem_m_ucf_prename , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group where sc_mem_m_membership_registered.prename_code = sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename_code and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no --and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no between '!as_sgrop!' and '!as_egrop'! and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_status_code = '0' /*WHERE*/
